key_finding: The inverse-variance weighted mean of all 8 model predictions (7 blind + 1 post-blind) gives a residual R_obs = +14.61 +/- 11.57 d (z = +1.26 sigma from GR null, z = +0.01 sigma from TEP). Reportable non-zero binomial sign test: 7/7 positive, p=0.0078 (blind non-zero: 6/6, p=0.0156). Legacy diagnostic counting zero as non-positive: 7/8 positive, p=0.0352. Chi-squared: GR chi2=2.3, TEP chi2=0.7, Delta chi2=+1.6 in favour of TEP (p=0.2069). TEP correction (14.5 d) reduces wRMS by 46%, improving 5/8 models. Inferred alpha = -0.0553 +/- 0.0438.

bootstrap_alpha_inference.method: Resample models with replacement, compute weighted-mean residual, convert to alpha

binomial_sign_test.reporting_caveat: Legacy diagnostic: exact zero residual counted as not positive. Use nonzero_all/nonzero_blind for reportable sign tests.
binomial_sign_test.wilcoxon_note: All 6 non-zero blind residuals positive (p=1/64=0.0156); all 7 non-zero total residuals positive (p=1/128=0.0078)

blind_only.legacy_reporting_caveat: Exact zero residual counted as not positive.

chi2_model_comparison.note: TEP has 0 free parameters (alpha_proxy=-0.055 from empirical SN Refsdal measurement)

per_model_results.name: Grillo+2024
per_model_results.ref: Grillo et al. 2024 (ApJ 971, 49) — post-blind precision update

evidence_tier.description: Separation of genuinely independent directional evidence from definitional amplitude evidence

tier_1_directional_sign_consistency.description: Tests that are independent of the amplitude calibration of alpha_proxy

wilcoxon_signed_rank_blind.note: All 6 non-zero blind residuals positive. Independent of R_tep_unit amplitude calibration.

binomial_sign_test_blind_7.note: 6/7 positive, counting exact zero as non-positive. Conservative diagnostic.

binomial_sign_test_nonzero_blind.note: 6/6 non-zero blind residuals positive. Reportable sign-only check.

binomial_sign_test_all_8.note: 7/8 positive, counting exact zero as non-positive. Legacy diagnostic including post-blind update.

binomial_sign_test_nonzero_all.note: 7/7 non-zero residuals positive. Reportable supplementary sign-only check.

tier_1_directional_sign_consistency.interpretation: These tests require only that the residuals have a consistent sign, not that their amplitude matches a pre-calibrated value. They are the most robust evidence strand because they are independent of alpha_proxy calibration and of the proxy-model amplitude.

tier_2_amplitude_consistency.description: Tests that compare observed residual amplitude against proxy-model prediction

weighted_mean_z_test.note: Definitional: alpha_proxy was calibrated from this same weighted mean residual via R_obs / R_tep_unit.

chi2_model_comparison.note: TEP has 0 free parameters because alpha_proxy is empirically determined from the same data.

tep_corrected_wrms.note: R_tep_prediction used for correction is derived from alpha_proxy, so this is a self-consistency check.

tier_2_amplitude_consistency.interpretation: These tests compare the observed residual amplitude to the proxy-model prediction at the empirically calibrated alpha_proxy. Because alpha_proxy was derived from the same SN Refsdal data (R_obs / R_tep_unit), the amplitude agreement is definitional, not an independent confirmation. The probative content lies in the directional sign consistency (Tier 1), not in the amplitude match.

headline_superseded_by.reason: Accounts for method-family dependence among lens-model predictions.

test_registry.primary_test_justification: Selected as the independence-assuming non-parametric directional benchmark: it equal-weights independent modelling groups, eliminating inverse-variance downweighting from heterogeneous model uncertainties. It is more powerful than the binomial sign test (which discards rank information) and more robust than the parametric z-test (which is biased by outlier uncertainties). Step 16 supersedes this as the correlation-aware headline with an exact family-sign-flip test.

weighted_mean_z_test.description: Inverse-variance weighted mean residual against GR null

binomial_sign_test_all_8.description: Legacy diagnostic binomial test on sign of all 8 model residuals; exact zero is counted as not positive.
binomial_sign_test_all_8.reporting_caveat: Do not use as headline; zero residuals carry no directional information.

binomial_sign_test_nonzero_all.description: Reportable binomial test on non-zero residual signs only
binomial_sign_test_nonzero_all.note: Exact zero residual excluded because it carries no directional information.

binomial_sign_test_blind_7.description: Legacy diagnostic binomial test on sign of 7 blind model residuals only; exact zero is counted as not positive.
binomial_sign_test_blind_7.reporting_caveat: Conservative diagnostic only; use binomial_sign_test_nonzero_blind for sign-only reporting.

binomial_sign_test_nonzero_blind.description: Reportable binomial test on non-zero blind residual signs only
binomial_sign_test_nonzero_blind.note: Exact zero residual excluded because it carries no directional information.

wilcoxon_signed_rank_all.description: Non-parametric signed-rank test on all non-zero residuals (equal weight per model)
wilcoxon_signed_rank_all.note: All 7 non-zero residuals positive; max statistic; p=1/2^7

wilcoxon_signed_rank_blind.description: Non-parametric signed-rank test on blind-only non-zero residuals (excludes post-blind update)
wilcoxon_signed_rank_blind.note: All 6 non-zero blind residuals positive; max statistic; p=1/2^6

chi2_model_comparison.description: Chi-squared ensemble fit: GR (R=0) vs TEP (R=R_pred)
chi2_model_comparison.note: TEP has 0 free parameters (alpha_proxy empirically determined)

tep_corrected_wrms.description: Weighted RMS reduction after subtracting TEP-predicted residual
